'''鈭歸-d-ch-y''' ('''kawadcheyoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:molester|molester]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-ch-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:molester|molester]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-d-ch-y
|-
! Lemma
| kawadcheyoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwadcheyoko|thiwadcheyoko]] || [[word:jiwadcheyoko|jiwadcheyoko]] || [[word:shiwadcheyoko|shiwadcheyoko]] || [[word:kiwadcheyoko|kiwadcheyoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwadcheyoko|thuthuwadcheyoko]] || [[word:jujuwadcheyoko|jujuwadcheyoko]] || [[word:shushuwadcheyoko|shushuwadcheyoko]] || [[word:kukuwadcheyoko|kukuwadcheyoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
